Created attachment 223063
update to 20210303

linux-steam-utils changes from 20201010:
- Removed some obsolete workarounds
- Added a couple of new workarounds (sorry about that)
- Added emulators/wine-proton support

The port has been reordered to please portclippy. I also disabled
portscout for obvious reasons.
